title: Dreams.
content:
Let me not mar that perfect dream
    By an auroral stain,
    But so adjust my daily night
    That it will come again.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Dreams.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
